sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113425" key="xarmodo/teira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρμοδότειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113425.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving delights,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄμφαξ</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">169</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
